original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 3 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH min_supplycosts AS (
  SELECT 
    ps_partkey, 
    MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
  FROM 
    partsupp
    JOIN supplier ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
    JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
  WHERE 
    region.r_name = 'AMERICA'
  GROUP BY 
    ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
  s.s_acctbal, 
  s.s_name, 
  n.n_name, 
  p.p_partkey, 
  p.p_mfgr, 
  s.s_address, 
  s.s_phone, 
  s.s_comment
FROM 
  part p
  JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
  JOIN min_supplycosts m ON p.p_partkey = m.ps_partkey AND ps.ps_supplycost = m.min_ps_supplycost
  JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
  JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
  JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
  p.p_size = 3 
  AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
  AND r.r_name = 'AMERICA'
ORDER BY 
  s.s_acctbal DESC, 
  n.n_name, 
  s.s_name, 
  p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace the correlated subquery with a CTE that precomputes the minimum supply cost for each part in America
Use explicit JOIN syntax instead of implicit joins for better readability and clarity
Avoid executing the expensive subquery for each row by precomputing all minimum costs at once
